entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The primary cereal crop studied for production intensification.

entities.name: MASSONGO
entities.description: A specific variety of maize used in the yield prediction study.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural production per unit area.

entities.name: TOTAL ABOVEGROUND BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the plant parts above the soil surface.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting agriculture.

entities.name: POOR SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The lack of essential nutrients in the soil hindering crop growth.

entities.name: VARIABILITY
entities.description: Year-to-year fluctuations in climate conditions.

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount of precipitation during the maize growing period.

entities.name: RCP4.5
entities.description: A representative concentration pathway scenario for moderate climate change projections.

entities.name: RCP8.5
entities.description: A representative concentration pathway scenario for high-emission climate change projections.

entities.name: NITROGEN LEACHING
entities.description: The loss of nitrogen from the soil due to water movement.

entities.name: CENTRAL WEST BURKINA FASO
entities.description: The specific geographic region where the study was conducted.

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The broader geographic region facing agricultural productivity obstacles.

entities.name: SUDANO-SAHELIAN ZONE
entities.description: The ecological zone in Burkina Faso where on-farm data was collected.

entities.name: DSSAT 4.6
entities.description: A crop simulation model used to evaluate maize performance and predict yield.

entities.name: CERES-DSSAT MODEL
entities.description: The specific crop growth model used for maize simulations.

entities.name: GCM ICHEC-EC-EARTH
entities.description: A regional climate model used to predict rainfall changes.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRIALS
entities.description: Field experiments used to disaggregate effects of soil fertility and climate variability.

entities.name: FERTILIZER INPUT RATES
entities.description: The application of specific amounts of nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium.

entities.name: ROOT-MEAN-SQUARE ERROR
entities.description: A statistical metric used to evaluate the efficiency of the crop model simulations.

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: Practices aimed at increasing the nutrient content of the soil.

entities.name: SPLITTING OF FERTILIZER APPLICATIONS
entities.description: The practice of applying fertilizer in multiple doses to improve uptake.

entities.name: LOW-RELEASE NITROGEN FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Fertilizers designed to release nitrogen slowly to reduce loss.

entities.name: AGROFORESTRY
entities.description: The integration of trees into agricultural landscapes to improve soil and water.

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION PRACTICES
entities.description: Techniques used to prevent soil erosion and retain moisture.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency and output of agricultural production.

entities.name: CLIMATE RISK ADAPTATION STRATEGIES
entities.description: Plans and practices devised to reduce vulnerability to climate change.

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A critical nutrient for maize growth and development.
